title: Echoes Of Nowhere
description: A Pure Liminal Space mod That doesn't have that many blocks
body:
# Echoes Of Nowhere
A Liminal space mod that focuses on the feeling that you're completely alone and isolated completely from society.
<details>
<summary>Liminal Spaces This Mod Has</summary>
  
  ## Infinite Cornfields
  You broke a piece of stone you found inside a temple you find in the Overworld, and Before you know it, you are transported here, a coarse dirt plain filled with nothing but Corn Plantations
  ## Cardinal Corridors
  You found a Barnfields, but it doesn't have anything inside, Only a single corridor with a lone Door at the End Of it. as you try to open the door, you are suddenly Transported to a dimension filled with nothing but Corridors
  ## Repeator Mall
  You Drank The Battery Acid you find inside a Barn in the Infinite Cornfields, you start to feel dizzy and soon transported to an infinitely repeating mall, Filled with abandoned stores, but oddly still working.
  
  ## More Liminal Spaces Coming Soon!
  
  
</details>

## Best settings for this mod
- Render Distance 6-8
- Simulation Distance 5-8
- Brightness 50-100
- Singleplayer (Optional)

## Credits And Info
This Mod Is still a WIP
## DON'T TRY ACTIONS PERFORMED IN THE MOD IN REAL LIFE!
### Developers
- ErzeKawek
### Artists
- ErzeKawek
### Music And Songs

- C418 (Biome Party)
